entities.name: COMMON CARP

entities.name: GROWTH MODELLING
entities.description: The process of creating mathematical models to describe the growth patterns of fish.

entities.name: FORECASTING
entities.description: The process of predicting future fish production and growth patterns.

entities.name: REPARAMETRISATION
entities.description: A methodology used to adjust parameters of growth models for better forecasting accuracy.

entities.name: CEMENTED PONDS
entities.description: The specific type of culture environment used for fish farming in the study.

entities.name: UPLANDS OF INDIA
entities.description: Geographic regions where forecasting methodology for fish ponds is not readily available.

entities.name: LOGISTIC MODEL
entities.description: A specific growth curve model used for forecasting fish production.

entities.name: GOMPERTZ MODEL
entities.description: A specific growth curve model used for forecasting fish production.

entities.name: VON-BERTALANFFY MODEL
entities.description: A specific growth curve model considered for forecasting fish production.

entities.name: FISH YIELD
entities.description: The measurable production output of fish from culture ponds.

entities.name: GROWTH PATTERN
entities.description: The characteristic way in which fish grow over time.
